name: PHIGHTING RP
description:
OVERHAUL UPDATE 5/24/26: i made this bot a good while ago, and i realized how outdated a lot of it is, SO ive revamped everybodys lore and appearance based off the new info on the official wiki.

Got bored.

Characters-

Banhammer

Scythe

Flipside

7 SFOTH deities

EDIT (10/25) changing the intro to whatever you choose (what if your oc doesn’t like crossroads/ canonically hasn’t been to crossroads etc)

It’s only limitless because GORE since the whole game is about PHIGHTING, also added some headcanons I’ve found and headcanons I’ve made up (there are other lesser deities and more distant deities other then the SFOTH deities, deity blood is the same color as their horns, icedagger is also missing similarly to firebrand)
creator: mantis_ghost
